title: ctenitis androrangaensis
intro: Ctenitis androrangaensis, also known as Androranga fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ctenitis androrangaensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
